description: Real-Time Interview Assistant MVP - AI-powered coaching during interviews with audio capture, transcription, and contextual suggestions

userStories.title: Initialize backend project structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the FastAPI backend project scaffolded with proper folder structure and dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/ folder with main.py, config.py, requirements.txt
Create backend/routers/, backend/services/, backend/models/, backend/utils/ folders
requirements.txt includes: fastapi==0.109.0, uvicorn[standard]==0.27.0, websockets==12.0, pydantic==2.5.3, pydantic-settings==2.1.0, python-dotenv==1.0.0
Create .env.example with OPENAI_API_KEY and ALLOWED_ORIGINS placeholders
main.py has basic FastAPI app with CORS middleware configured
config.py uses pydantic-settings to load environment variables

userStories.title: Create backend data models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Pydantic models for session state, messages, and context.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/models/session.py contains Session, SessionContext, TranscriptEntry dataclasses
backend/models/messages.py contains ClientMessage and ServerMessage Pydantic models
ClientMessage supports: session.start, session.end, audio, verbosity.change, ping
ServerMessage supports: session.ready, transcript.delta, suggestion, connection.status, error, pong
All models have proper type hints
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement session manager service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a session manager to track active sessions in memory.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/services/session_manager.py contains SessionManager class
Can create new session with unique ID
Can store and retrieve session context (job description, resume, work experience)
Can store verbosity setting per session
Can add transcript entries to session
Can clear session on disconnect
All data stored in memory only (no persistence)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement OpenAI Realtime API client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service to connect to OpenAI's Realtime API via WebSocket.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/services/openai_relay.py contains OpenAIRealtimeClient class
Can establish WebSocket connection to wss://api.openai.com/v1/realtime
Sends session.update with modalities=['text'], server_vad, and system instructions
build_instructions() function creates prompt with job description, resume, work experience placeholders
get_max_tokens() returns 150/300/500 based on verbosity (concise/moderate/detailed)
Handles connection errors gracefully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket relay endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a WebSocket endpoint that relays between browser and OpenAI.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/routers/websocket.py contains /ws WebSocket endpoint
Accepts session.start message with context and creates session
Forwards audio binary data to OpenAI connection
Forwards OpenAI responses (transcript.delta, response.text.delta) to client
Handles session.end message and cleans up
Implements ping/pong for latency measurement
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add health check endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a health check endpoint to verify the backend is running.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /health returns {status: 'healthy', version: '1.0.0'}
Endpoint is accessible without authentication
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Initialize frontend project structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Next.js frontend project scaffolded with Tailwind CSS.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/ folder with Next.js 14 app router structure
package.json includes: next, react, react-dom, zustand, typescript, tailwindcss
tailwind.config.js configured with dark theme colors from PRD
globals.css has CSS variables for dark theme (--bg-primary, --bg-secondary, etc.)
app/layout.tsx sets dark background and font
app/page.tsx renders basic 'Interview Assistant' heading
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create TypeScript type definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared TypeScript types for the frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/types/index.ts contains all shared types
TranscriptEntry interface with id, timestamp, speaker, text, isFinal
Suggestion interface with id, timestamp, response, keyPoints, followUp
SessionContext interface with jobDescription, resume, workExperience
Verbosity type: 'concise' | 'moderate' | 'detailed'
ConnectionStatus type: 'idle' | 'connecting' | 'connected' | 'reconnecting' | 'error'
ClientMessage and ServerMessage types matching backend
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Zustand session store
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Zustand store to manage session state.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/stores/sessionStore.ts contains useSessionStore hook
State includes: status, latency, micLevel, systemLevel, transcript, currentSuggestion, verbosity, context
Actions include: setStatus, setLatency, setAudioLevels, addTranscriptEntry, updateTranscriptEntry, setSuggestion, setVerbosity, setContext, reset
Default verbosity is 'moderate'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create browser compatibility check component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see an error if my browser doesn't support required features.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/BrowserCheck.tsx checks for Chrome or Edge
Shows error message if browser is Firefox, Safari, or other
Error message explains system audio capture requires Chrome/Edge
Provides links to download Chrome and Edge
Only renders children if browser is supported
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create ethical disclaimer modal component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see and accept an ethical usage disclaimer before using the app.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Disclaimer.tsx shows modal with usage guidelines
Modal content matches PRD (recommended use, your responsibility)
Has 'I Understand - Continue' button
Modal cannot be dismissed without clicking the button
On accept, calls onAccept callback prop
Dark themed modal matching app design
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create context input component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to input my job description, resume, and work experience.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/ContextInput/ContextInput.tsx contains main component
frontend/components/ContextInput/TextAreaField.tsx is reusable text area
Three text areas: Job Description, Resume, Work Experience
Each has label and placeholder text
Values stored in Zustand store via setContext
Dark themed with --bg-tertiary background
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create verbosity selector component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to choose how verbose the AI suggestions should be.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Settings/VerbositySelector.tsx with radio group
Three options: Concise, Moderate (default), Detailed
Each option has description text explaining the style
Selection updates Zustand store via setVerbosity
Dark themed radio buttons
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create WebSocket connection hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to manage WebSocket connection to the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/hooks/useWebSocket.ts contains useWebSocket hook
Can connect to ws://localhost:8000/ws
Can send JSON messages (session.start, session.end, ping)
Can send binary audio data
Handles incoming messages and dispatches to store
Updates connection status in store
Provides sendMessage and sendAudio functions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create reconnection hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auto-reconnection logic with exponential backoff.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/hooks/useReconnection.ts contains useReconnection hook
Implements exponential backoff: baseDelay 1s, maxDelay 30s, jitter 30%
Max 10 reconnection attempts
Updates store status to 'reconnecting' during attempts
Returns reconnect function and attempt count
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create audio capture hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to capture microphone and system audio.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/hooks/useAudioCapture.ts contains useAudioCapture hook
Can request microphone permission via getUserMedia
Can request screen share permission via getDisplayMedia
Creates AudioContext and connects both streams
Provides startCapture and stopCapture functions
Updates micActive and systemActive in store
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create AudioWorklet processor for audio merging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an AudioWorklet to merge and convert audio to PCM16.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/AudioCapture/audio-worklet.ts contains processor code
AudioMergerProcessor class extends AudioWorkletProcessor
Mixes mic and system audio inputs (average)
Converts Float32 to PCM16 format
Posts audio data to main thread via port.postMessage
frontend/lib/audioUtils.ts has calculateAudioLevel function for RMS calculation
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create audio capture orchestrator component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a component that orchestrates audio capture and streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/AudioCapture/AudioCapture.tsx orchestrates capture
Loads AudioWorklet processor
Creates AudioContext with 24kHz sample rate
Connects mic and system streams to merger worklet
Sends PCM16 audio data via WebSocket
Calculates and updates audio levels in store
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create connection status indicator component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see the current connection status and latency.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/StatusBar/ConnectionStatus.tsx shows status
Green dot + 'Connected (Xms)' when connected
Yellow dot + 'Reconnecting...' when reconnecting
Red dot + 'Disconnected' when disconnected
Reads status and latency from Zustand store
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create audio level meter component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see audio level meters to confirm sound is being captured.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/StatusBar/AudioLevelMeter.tsx shows level bar
Takes label prop ('Mic' or 'System') and level prop (0-1)
Renders horizontal bar that fills based on level
Uses accent-green for active levels
Reads micLevel and systemLevel from store
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create status bar component
userStories.description: As a user, I need a status bar showing audio meters and connection status.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/StatusBar/StatusBar.tsx combines indicators
Shows Mic level meter on left
Shows System level meter in middle
Shows connection status on right
Has settings icon button (functionality deferred)
Dark themed with --bg-secondary background
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create transcript panel component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see the live transcription of the conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Panels/TranscriptPanel.tsx shows transcript
Reads transcript array from Zustand store
Each entry shows speaker icon and label (You or Interviewer)
Interviewer text in --interviewer color (blue)
User text in --user color (purple)
Auto-scrolls to bottom on new entries
Shows typing indicator for non-final entries
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create suggestion panel component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see AI suggestions when questions are detected.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Panels/SuggestionPanel.tsx shows current suggestion
Reads currentSuggestion from Zustand store
Shows 'Suggested Response' section with response text
Shows 'Key Points' section with bullet list
Shows 'If They Ask More' section with followUp text
Dark themed with --suggestion-bg background
Shows empty state when no suggestion
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create split layout component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see transcript and suggestions in a side-by-side layout.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Panels/SplitLayout.tsx contains split panel
Left panel: TranscriptPanel (50% width)
Right panel: SuggestionPanel (50% width)
Both panels have equal height, scrollable independently
Vertical divider between panels
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create session controls component
userStories.description: As a user, I need Start and End Session buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/components/Controls/SessionControls.tsx contains buttons
Start Session button (green) when status is 'idle'
End Session button (red) when status is 'connected'
Start triggers audio capture and WebSocket connection
End stops audio capture and closes WebSocket
Disabled state while connecting
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Assemble main page with full user flow
userStories.description: As a user, I need the complete app flow: browser check, disclaimer, context input, session.
acceptanceCriteria: app/page.tsx shows BrowserCheck wrapper
Shows Disclaimer modal on first load, stores acceptance in state
After accept, shows ContextInput and VerbositySelector
Shows Start Session button below context inputs
After starting, shows StatusBar, SplitLayout, and End Session button
Full dark theme applied
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wire up end-to-end audio and suggestion flow
userStories.description: As a user, I need the full flow: capture audio, get transcription, see suggestions.
acceptanceCriteria: Starting session sends session.start with context to backend
Audio capture streams PCM16 to backend
Backend relays to OpenAI and returns transcript.delta messages
Transcript entries appear in TranscriptPanel
AI suggestions appear in SuggestionPanel when questions detected
Ending session cleans up and resets state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add error handling and toast notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see error messages when things go wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Create simple toast notification component
Show toast on connection lost: 'Connection lost. Reconnecting...'
Show toast on reconnect success: 'Reconnected'
Show error modal for permission denied (mic, screen share)
Errors are dismissible
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
